calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-03-2017 Vacated

Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Bifurcate Liability And Damages Issues
Off Calendar Feb-06-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Anna J. Monteleone, of Michael Sullivan & Associates LLP, Tel. 714.202.3440 ext. 3456, appearing via CourtCall;
No other appearances in the matter.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT UNIVERSAL PROTECTION SERVICES, LP Motion To Bifurcate Liability And Damages Issues is GRANTED. No opposition filed. This order is without prejudice to the trial judge making an order regarding the sequencing of the trial as she or he determines. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
